PR surface: Source 0. Total 0 across 2 files.

target.title: fix(check): clean ingress queue lint blockers
target.body:
Summary:
- Remove lint-invalid casts/generic JSON helper in the SQLite ingress queue implementation.
- Remove an empty object-spread fallback in plugin state queue construction.
- Leaves the pending duplicate test narrowing to current `main`, where that fix has already landed.

Verification:
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/channels/message/ingress-queue.ts src/plugins/registry.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/channels/message/ingress-queue.ts src/plugins/registry.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Earlier related Crabbox AWS changed gate for the ingress typecheck blocker: provider=aws lease=cbx_7dac306becb0 slug=violet-crab run=run_762803ecc131 exit=0 lanes=coreTests

Behavior addressed: current main changed-gate proof can fail in core lint on the new SQLite ingress queue and plugin registry state queue path.
Real environment tested: local targeted formatting and oxlint on this branch; AWS Crabbox proof for the related typecheck blocker before main landed the test narrowing.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/channels/message/ingress-queue.ts src/plugins/registry.ts`.
Evidence after fix: targeted oxlint reports 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Observed result after fix: the ingress queue source lint and plugin registry lint issues are fixed locally.
What was not tested: final full `pnpm check:changed` after adding these lint cleanups is pending in the stacked local-model lane.
target.author: vincentkoc
